song.title: Ten Years Strong
song.keywords: 10 years, proposal, commitment, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Ten Years Strong' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Ten Years Strong Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical

twitter.title: Ten Years Strong Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Ten Years Strong' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Anniversary.

essay: Ten Years Strong measures recovery by durability and lived evidence. It honors long-term change, showing how identity can be rebuilt through sustained honesty and community support.
song.lyricsHtml:
I thought I'd never make it here
From broken nights from wasted years
But then you smiled you took my hand
And somehow baby I can stand

Ten years strong ten years true
Every storm just brought me back to you
Ten years long the fight the song
And still my heart beats where you belong

From shaky starts to steady hands
From broken nights to promised plans
We stitched a life from threads of pain
And turned it into love again

Ten years strong ten years true
Every morning I wake and choose you
Ten years long through right through wrong
And still this love is burning strong

I once believed that love would fade
A fleeting spark that night unmade
But here we stand and I can see
The fire the song were always we

Ten years strong ten years true
Every scar now leads me back to you
Ten years long we've found where we belong
Forever's here because of you

Ten years strong ten years true
Ten years and I still choose you
Ten years strong ten years bold
Ten years plus a lifetime to hold

Ten years
And tonight
Will you marry me
